task_completion.description: Navigate to the Amalfi Coast in Italy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application viewport shows the Amalfi Coast in Italy. Labels for 'Amalfi', 'Positano', or the coastline geography are visible.

task_completion.description: Create a path connecting Positano and Amalfi
task_completion.visual_evidence: A drawn path or line is visible on the map extending between the towns of Positano and Amalfi. A 'New Path' or properties dialog may be open.
The 'Movie Maker' dialog box is visible on the screen (typically accessed via Tools > Movie Maker).

task_completion.description: Configure video resolution to at least 1280x720
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Movie Maker settings show the resolution set to '1280x720', '1280 x 720', or 'HD 720p'.

task_completion.description: Set the output file path and name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog or filename field shows '/home/ga/Videos/amalfi_flythrough.mp4' or just 'amalfi_flythrough.mp4' being entered.

task_completion.description: Initiate or verify the video export process
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Recording' or 'Saving' progress bar is visible, or the file browser shows the newly created 'amalfi_flythrough.mp4' file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI to create the video
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the mapping software's menus and dialogs, not a terminal window running ffmpeg or script commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the 3D map software
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the 3D rendering of the terrain/globe, not a static image, web search result, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent generated the file rather than copying/renaming
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen configuring the export settings and saving, rather than using 'cp' or 'mv' commands in a terminal to move a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Amalfi Coast (40.6333° N, 14.6000° E). Required output file: /home/ga/Videos/amalfi_flythrough.mp4. Minimum resolution: 1280x720.
